notice_title: Python code execution sandbox escape in non-docker version
mitigation_interpretation_delta: Separate vendor-authored notice confirms the patch/workaround pattern already visible in the CVE record.
uncertainty_note: GitHub-hosted upstream advisory; useful for remediation visibility, not for claims about independent official adjudication.
paper_use_note: Supports a reviewer-facing row showing that execution-boundary cases can have explicit vendor remediation metadata.

notice_title: [Security Issue] Code Execution against underlying host system in Custom Component
mitigation_interpretation_delta: Public repo issue improves provenance for discussion of the surface but does not verify a fix or justify a tier upgrade.
uncertainty_note: Closed issue status alone should not be treated as proof of remediation or authoritative severity resolution.
paper_use_note: Useful as negative evidence in the hostile-reviewer pass: vendor-repo discussion exists, but formal remediation notice remains missing.

notice_title: Permissive Default Allowlist Enables Unauthorized File Read and Network Exfiltration in Claude Code
mitigation_interpretation_delta: Separate vendor-authored notice supports the forced-update/remediation reading already captured from the CVE text.
uncertainty_note: Supports mitigation visibility only; do not convert this into prevalence or comparative-safety claims.
paper_use_note: Supports the approval-model failure subsection with stronger remediation metadata than a CVE-only row.

notice_title: CrewAI contains multiple vulnerabilities including SSRF, RCE and local file read
mitigation_interpretation_delta: Adds an authoritative public coordination notice but still leaves direct vendor remediation/version details incomplete in the local package.
uncertainty_note: CERT/CC overview says the vendor addressed some but not all issues; keep vendor-remediation status explicit rather than inferred.
paper_use_note: Supports a limitations paragraph about third-party coordination evidence versus direct vendor fix bulletins.
